title: Fauvist Wash
description: Ce style présente des lavis énergiques et fluides d'aquarelle et de gouache diluée avec une palette de couleurs restreinte et saisissante. Les formes et les ombres allongées sont définies par des coups de pinceau audacieux et superposés de couleurs unies plutôt que par des contours rigides, utilisant un espace négatif blanc éclatant pour construire structurellement la composition. Le résultat est une esthétique éditoriale vibrante du milieu du siècle avec des bords organiques peints à la main.
description_en: This style features energetic, loose watercolor and thinned gouache washes with a stark, limited color palette. Forms and elongated shadows are defined by bold, overlapping brushstrokes of solid color rather than rigid outlines, utilizing stark white negative space to structurally build the composition. The result is a vibrant, mid-century modern editorial aesthetic with organic, hand-painted edges.
description_fr: Ce style présente des lavis énergiques et fluides d'aquarelle et de gouache diluée avec une palette de couleurs restreinte et saisissante. Les formes et les ombres allongées sont définies par des coups de pinceau audacieux et superposés de couleurs unies plutôt que par des contours rigides, utilisant un espace négatif blanc éclatant pour construire structurellement la composition. Le résultat est une esthétique éditoriale vibrante du milieu du siècle avec des bords organiques peints à la main.
prompt: Loose watercolor and thinned gouache wash illustration on textured cold-pressed paper. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The image MUST occupy the absolute ENTIRE dedicated space as a canvas rule: NO borders, NO frames, NO white margins, NO canvas edges, FULL BLEED to all four corners. The rendering technique relies on spontaneous, energetic brushwork where forms are constructed through bold, overlapping blocks of color rather than rigid black outlines. Utilize a high-contrast, limited duotone or triotone palette driven by {{primary_color}} and {{accent_color}}, while {{secondary_color}} is specifically deployed for deep, graphic cast shadows. The lighting is bright and directional, implying stark daylight, but rendered flatly—shadows are painted as solid, unblended shapes with distinct, organic edges. Embrace the materiality of water-based media: showcase slight pigment pooling, wet-on-dry layering, and varying opacities within the strokes. Stark, unpainted negative space is heavily utilized as a structural component, contrasting sharply against the vibrant washes to define volume and spatial dynamics. Edges of subjects should be slightly ragged and expressive, reflecting the swift motion of a wide brush. The overall atmosphere is breezy, vibrant, and reminiscent of mid-century modern editorial illustration or contemporary Fauvist sketches. The spatial depth is achieved through the graphic overlapping of flat color planes rather than realistic linear perspective, keeping the composition distinctly two-dimensional and graphic. Ensure the paper grain texture is subtly visible beneath the translucent washes, adding tactile warmth to the energetic composition. watercolor wash, gouache illustration, mid-century modern, fauvist palette, expressive brushstrokes, negative space, flat planes, graphic shadows, pigment pooling, wet-on-dry, hand-painted edges, vibrant editorial art, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame

background_prompt: A loose watercolor and thinned gouache wash landscape and abstract environment. The scene is constructed entirely of flat, overlapping planes of vibrant {{primary_color}} and {{accent_color}}, with long, graphic cast shadows rendered in solid blocks of {{secondary_color}}. The composition is devoid of any central subject, focusing purely on atmospheric depth, stark daylight, and the energetic, spontaneous brushstrokes. Unpainted negative space acts as a structural element, revealing subtle cold-pressed paper grain texture beneath the wet-on-dry pigment pooling.
background_prompt_removebg: A loose watercolor and thinned gouache wash landscape and abstract environment. The scene is constructed entirely of flat, overlapping planes of vibrant {{primary_color}} and {{accent_color}}, with long, graphic cast shadows rendered in solid blocks of {{secondary_color}}. The composition is devoid of any central subject, focusing purely on atmospheric depth, stark daylight, and energetic brushstrokes. A decorative foreground frame made of expressive, ragged watercolor brushstrokes and vibrant ink splatters creates depth, transitioning smoothly into a flat {{background_color}} surface. Unpainted negative space acts as a structural element, revealing subtle cold-pressed paper grain texture beneath the wet-on-dry pigment pooling against the {{background_color}} backdrop.
